finding_results.notes: Compressed the four-line echo into a two-line exchange so Nura's relief lands once and Halima immediately redirects attention to the vulnerable middle of the ledger before the scene confirms the missing copied pages.

summary: Addressed the packet's dialogue-cadence finding by tightening the ledger-survival beat and pivoting directly into the discovery of the missing extracts.
